diffCoverage.notes: Reviewed the contact path end to end: zalo::list_contacts mapping, command, DTO, and the UI store/pane. The live test loaded 85 real contacts.

findings.evidence: Contact carries only public fields (uid/displayName/zaloName/avatar) — no credential/session data. list_contacts reuses the stored session and returns these DTOs; nothing secret crosses IPC, and the live smoke prints only a count.
findings.fix: Keep avatars/display fields the only contact data surfaced; never attach session/token data to a Contact.

findings.evidence: CSP img-src extended to Zalo CDNs (*.zadn.vn, *.zalo.me) so contact avatars render; script-src/connect-src unchanged. Avatars are images only, no script/connect surface added.
findings.fix: Keep the avatar CDN allowlist tight; do not broaden script-src/connect-src for media.

summary: thread-list loads the real friend list via get_all_friends, mapped to non-secret Contact DTOs inside the zalo layer, and renders a scrollable A–Z Danh bạ pane wired through IPC (no mock data). Live smoke loaded 85 contacts; build/clippy/type-check pass and real browser validation passed. CSP widened only for avatar images. Safe to mark done.
